description: Implement src/tools/component.ts and src/handlers/suggest.ts for 4 tools. get_component: calls parseCem, returns JSON stringified component metadata. validate_cem: calls validateCompleteness, formats pass/fail output with issue list. suggest_usage: NEW — synthesizes from CEM member list to generate an HTML snippet showing the component with key attributes populated, marks required vs optional, lists variant options from union types. generate_import: NEW — reads CEM exports field and package.json to determine correct import path, handles both side-effect and named imports. Write tests/handlers/suggest.test.ts FIRST — test suggest_usage for a component with variants, for one with no required attrs, and for one with slots. Test generate_import for both export patterns.
title: Component API tools — get_component, validate_cem, suggest_usage, generate_import
